titleStmt.title: SII 22.158: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 158. (A.R. No. 158 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, ELVĀNĀŚŪR. GRĀMĀRDHANĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. TRIBH. VIRARĀJĒNDRA-CHŌḶA (KULŌTTUṄGA III)—6th YEAR (A.D. 1183-84).

summary.p: The details of date are given as Makara śu. 2, Monday, Aviṭṭam may correspond to A.D. 1183, December 19, the tithi having ended at .66 on the previous day.

This records a gift by Kiḷiyūr Malaiyamāṉ Sūriyaṉ Nīrēṟṟāṉ alias Rājarāja-Malaiyakularāyaṉ the chief of Malāḍu, of the taxes kaḍamai and pāḍikāval due to him in kind from Puttūr a village belonging to the sabhā of the place, to provide for offerings and unguents to the deity in the temple of Ūrbāgaṅkoṇḍaruḷiya-Nāyanār at Iṟaiyānaraiyūr. Other taxes also like taṟiyiṟai, taṭṭārpāṭṭam, veṭṭimuṭṭaiyāḷ were made over to the temple and were to be collected by the sabhā on behalf of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī vira rājentiracoḻatevaṟkku yāṇṭu 6vatu makara nāyaṟṟu pūrvapakkuḻattu dvitiyaiyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aviṭṭatti nāḷ malāṭā
ṉa jananātavaḷanāṭṭu pānūrkūṟṟattu brahmatecam Iṟaiyānaraiyūrāṉa śrī coḻakeraḷacaturvedimaṅkalattu Uṭaiyār Ūrpākaṅkoṇṭaruḷiya nāyanārkku I
ṉnāṭuuṭaiya kiḷiyūr malaiyamāṉ cūriyaṉ nireṟṟāṉāna Irājarāja malaiyakula rāyaneṉ Iṉnāyanāṟkku Amutupaṭikkum tirumeṟpūccukkum nāyanāṟkku nāṉ nirvārttu ku
ṭutta Ivvūr sabhaiyār kāṇiyāṉa puttūril nāṉ koḷkiṟa kaṭamai yum pāṭikāvalum śrī paṇṭārattile Ūrpākaṅkoṇṭāṉ marakkālāle Ivvūr kāṇi Uṭaiya sa
bhaiyār Aḷaṉtu taravukoḷḷakkaṭavutākavum Ivvūr taṟiiṟai taṭṭārp pāṭṭamum Ivvūr paṇicey makkaḷum Uḻavukuṭimakkaḷum koyilile veṭṭi muṭṭai
yāḷum nāṉkoḷkiṟa Eppeṟpaṭṭa tevaiyum ceyvārkaḷākavum Ippaṭi naṉceyyāl vanta kaṭamai nāṉ koḷkiṟapaṭiye śrīpaṇṭārattile Ic cabhaiyār taṅkaḷ ka
ṭamaiyāyuḷḷatu Aḷantu taravukoḷḷakkaṭavārkaḷāka kalveṭṭivitteṉ Irājarājamalaiyakularāyaneṉ Ittaṉmam Aḻippāṉ taṅkaḷammaikkut tāne maṇāḷaṉ villavaraiyaṉ cat
tiyam keṅkai Iṭai kumari Iṭai ceytāṉ ceyta pāvaṅkoḷvāṉ Itu paṉmākecura Ilaṭkṣai Ivvūr nāṉkellaiyuḷppaṭṭa naṉceynilamuṟṟum viṭṭatu Ippaṭikkut tiru
ccūlakkallu nāṭṭikkoḷka paṉmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 22.158 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
